narrative:
Jefferson Twp township has 1,333 registered voters, with 51.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 6.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 36.2 percentage points.
